description: State and refusal vectors for the relying-party-pinned AEB evidence-adapter boundary.

vectors.input: two independently verified roles project to one CAID
one required role has a status older than the pinned max age
one required role is explicitly revoked
a native artifact maps to a different CAID
a committed operation is presented again with the same nonce
a verdict is changed without a valid evaluator signature and re-derivation
the mapping profile names a mapper outside the relying party accepted mapper set
the mapping profile discloses an omitted material source field while claiming equivalence
the human quorum repeats one subject or includes the action initiator
an evidence-role entry is substituted with a mapping-profile entry under a recomputed registry digest
all native legs are joined through the relying-party-pinned EP-AEC-v1 requirement over one CAID action
two adapters return the same CAID but bind different normalized material-action digests
production authorization is attempted with an ephemeral or non-ownership-fenced store
RP-pinned native verifiers attest a WIMSE possession row and a human-authorization row mapped to one CAID
